sections.a_description: Diseases of distribution. Building in secret and calling it a strategy. The product is ready — but nobody knows it exists.

a_image.alt: Rocket on a launch pad shrouded in fog and hesitation, dramatic dark lighting, launch anxiety metaphor

sections.a_description: The diseases that keep your product from ever reaching people.

items.a_description: The product is 95% ready. It's been 95% ready for four months. There's always one more thing before it's "really" ready.

a_image.alt: Finger hovering over a big red launch button trembling, dark dramatic close-up, launch anxiety

items.a_description: You built it. Nobody came. Because nobody knew. Zero marketing budget, zero audience, zero plan to change that.

a_image.alt: Beautiful product sitting alone in a dark empty warehouse, no distribution channels metaphor

items.a_description: Launch day arrives and the only visitor is your own browser. You skipped the part where you build an audience before building the product.

a_image.alt: Empty theater with a spotlight on an empty stage, no audience metaphor, dark moody atmosphere

items.a_description: Your MVP launch strategy is "post on Reddit and hope." That's not a strategy — that's a wish.

a_image.alt: Minimalist rocket made of cardboard and tape on a real launch pad, scrappy MVP launch metaphor, dark

seo.title: Launch — Diseases of Distribution | Sickness Labs
seo.description: Launch fear, no distribution, no audience, broken MVP launch strategy. The diseases that kill indie products at the finish line.
